description_long: This shotgun features a robust, military-inspired design with a predominantly olive green and black color scheme. It has a long, cylindrical barrel with a vented muzzle and a prominent, angular carry handle mounted above the receiver. The stock is solid and rectangular, providing stability, while the pistol grip is ergonomically shaped for secure handling. A box magazine is visible beneath the receiver, indicating a magazine-fed mechanism. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components, giving it a modern, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A tactical, olive green and black shotgun with a carry handle, box magazine, and ergonomic pistol grip, designed for urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the carry handle, box magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the alignment of the carry handle above the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the box magazine and stock clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the solid stock end and the alignment of the handle and barrel.
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement
